title: infer-configuration-values — input
description: Input to the infer-configuration-values Tool — the only probabilistic Tool in the discover-project Workflow. Invoked by the propose-configuration-values Step (Infer phase) with the aggregated Detect-phase findings plus the token budget per NFR-002.

detection_result.description: Aggregated payload from the Detect phase — typically {repo_root_detection, manifest_findings, ci_findings, repo_contract_findings}. Opaque to the schema (the Tool's prompt-composition logic shapes it for the LLM).

token_budget.description: Maximum tokens the LLM call may consume (NFR-002 default = 10000). Exceedance raises the token-budget-exceeded FailureMode (MUC-008) and the Workflow falls back to the Null adapter.
